answers.question: List of scenarios
answers.notes: The document is only a 2-page Climate-Related Disclosures Index and Statement of Compliance for SkyCity Entertainment Group FY24. It references scenario analysis at pages 75-79 of the Annual Report 2024, but those pages are not included in this document. No scenario names are listed anywhere in the available text.

answers.question: Global temperature outcome by 2100
answers.notes: The document only mentions "limiting global warming to 1.5 degrees celsius" in the context of a GHG emissions target disclosure requirement (NZ CS 1 paragraph 23(e)), not as a described scenario outcome. No temperature outcomes by 2100 are described in the available document text. The actual scenario analysis is referenced at Annual Report pages 75-79, which are not included.
